trending_topic: OpenAI's new GPT-4.5 'reasoning tokens' feature is letting ChatGPT users solve complex business problems with transparent step-by-step logic, making it the hottest upgrade for entrepreneurs doing financial modeling and strategy planning.
money_tip: Use Claude or ChatGPT to rewrite your freelance service descriptions by pasting competitor listings and asking 'make this more compelling for [target client]'—freelancers report 40% more Upwork/Fiverr responses within 48 hours using this exact prompt.
free_tool_spotlight: Pika 1.5 (free tier) now generates 3-second product demo videos from single images—perfect for dropshippers and Amazon sellers who need scroll-stopping ad content without hiring videographers.
